doc.aspectratio_a11y_desc: No specific ARIA requirements — accessibility is determined by child content.
doc.aspectratio_anatomy_content: The primary area where main content or children are rendered.
doc.aspectratio_anatomy_root: The outermost container managing state and layout.
doc.aspectratio_basic_desc: Details and usage for the Aspect Ratio component.
doc.aspectratio_best_practice_1: Use AspectRatio consistently across your application to maintain a predictable user experience.
doc.aspectratio_best_practice_2: Test AspectRatio behavior across different screen sizes and input methods to ensure accessibility.
doc.aspectratio_choice_alt_when: When a simpler alternative like Box better suits the use case.
doc.aspectratio_choice_matrix_desc: Select the most appropriate component based on your requirements.
doc.aspectratio_choice_self_when: When AspectRatio functionality with standard options is required.
doc.aspectratio_content_guideline: Choose standard ratios (16:9 for video, 1:1 for thumbnails) to match user expectations.
doc.aspectratio_design_intent: AspectRatio maintains a fixed width-to-height ratio for its content, preventing layout shifts when images or videos load.
doc.aspectratio_long_desc: A component for displaying content such as images or videos responsively while maintaining a specified ratio (e.g., 16:9 or 4:3).
doc.aspectratio_motion_desc: No animation by default; purely a layout utility.
doc.aspectratio_scenario_1: Integrating AspectRatio into workflows for data collection or display.
doc.aspectratio_scenario_2: Using AspectRatio in management views for information organization.
doc.audio_a11y_desc: Uses native audio element enhanced with custom accessible controls. Each button has an aria-label describing its function.
doc.audio_anatomy_content: The primary area where main content or children are rendered.
doc.audio_anatomy_root: The outermost container managing state and layout.
doc.audio_autoplay_desc: Combine autoPlay and muted to start audio automatically without user interaction. Suitable for ambient background music or notification sounds.
doc.audio_basic_desc: Provides basic functions like play, pause, and volume control.
doc.audio_best_practice_1: Use Audio consistently across your application to maintain a predictable user experience.
doc.audio_best_practice_2: Test Audio behavior across different screen sizes and input methods to ensure accessibility.
doc.audio_choice_alt_when: When a simpler alternative like Video better suits the use case.
doc.audio_choice_matrix_desc: Select the most appropriate component based on your requirements.
doc.audio_choice_self_when: When Audio functionality with standard options is required.
doc.audio_content_guideline: Always provide visible controls so users can manage playback. Include alt text or captions where applicable.
doc.audio_custom_controls_desc: Customize which controls are displayed, such as seek bars and playback speed.
doc.audio_customization_desc: Add features like playback speed adjustment, loop playback, and waveform display.
doc.audio_design_intent: Audio provides a consistent player interface for audio content with controls for play, pause, volume, and seek.
doc.audio_full_featured_desc: A complete player with playlist, waveform visualizer, playback speed, fade-in/out, crossfade, hotkeys, and sleep timer all enabled.
doc.audio_important_notice_desc: Playback without user interaction may be restricted by browser autoplay policies.
doc.audio_long_desc: A component for playing and controlling audio files.
doc.audio_motion_desc: Play/pause button transitions smoothly between states. Progress bar updates in real-time.
doc.audio_premium_features_mdx_desc: Use the demoDelay prop to display a skeleton UI before the player becomes active — ideal for simulating async data fetching.
doc.audio_scenario_1: Podcast & Language Learning: Play episode lists in sequence with playlist support. Users can adjust playback speed for listening comprehension training.
doc.audio_scenario_2: Chat & Voice Messages: Embed a compact inline audio player within chat messages for one-tap playback of voice notes.
doc.audio_scenario_3: Background BGM & Notifications: Use autoPlay + muted for ambient background music, or trigger short notification sounds after user actions.
doc.audio_styling_desc: Flexibly change the appearance, including border radius and color schemes.
doc.audio_title: Component for playing and controlling audio files.
doc.carousel_a11y_spec: Support navigation with arrow keys and provide appropriate labels (aria-label) for each slide. A means for users to pause during auto-play must be provided.
doc.carousel_accessibility_desc: Supports keyboard navigation (arrow keys). slides carry aria-labels, and autoplay pauses on interaction.
doc.carousel_anatomy_indicators: Dots or numbers showing the current position and total count.
doc.carousel_anatomy_nav_buttons: Arrow buttons to move to previous or next slides.
doc.carousel_anatomy_viewport: The visible area where active slides are displayed.
doc.carousel_aspect_ratio_desc: Combine with the AspectRatio component to maintain consistent slide dimensions.
doc.carousel_autoplay_desc: Enable the autoplay property to automatically rotate slides at a set interval.
doc.carousel_basic_desc: Standard setup for the Carousel component.
doc.carousel_benefit_attention_desc: Dynamic UI movement draws user attention to highlighted content.
doc.carousel_benefit_emphasis_desc: Large-scale banners increase the promotional impact of featured items.
doc.carousel_benefit_space_desc: Packs multiple pieces of content into a single area for proactive user browsing.
doc.carousel_best_practice_1: When using autoplay, ensure enough time for users to read the content and include controls like pausing on hover.
doc.carousel_best_practice_2: Always provide indicators (dots, etc.) for current position and navigation buttons to ensure usability.
doc.carousel_challenge_perf_desc: Loading many high-resolution images can slow down page rendering.
doc.carousel_challenge_perf_sol: Use lazy loading or virtualization to render only visible slides.
doc.carousel_challenge_stress_desc: Confusing controls or intrusive autoplay can frustrate users.
doc.carousel_challenge_stress_sol: Provide clear nav buttons and ensure autoplay pauses on user hover/touch.
doc.carousel_challenge_unseen_desc: Users may overlook content that isn't immediately visible.
doc.carousel_challenge_unseen_sol: Show a 'peek' of the next slide or use clear indicators (dots).
doc.carousel_char_carousel: Displays multiple items simultaneously; primarily user-controlled navigation.
doc.carousel_char_slider: Provides continuous scrolling via drag/swipe; also used for numeric ranges (RangeSlider).
doc.carousel_char_slideshow: Focuses on automatic rotation of large visuals or full-screen images.
doc.carousel_choice_carousel_when: Display multiple items simultaneously and allow users to switch via navigation. Suitable for banners and product showcases.
doc.carousel_choice_matrix_desc: Select the optimal component based on the content type and display method.
doc.carousel_choice_slider_when: Allows continuous scrolling via drag or swipe. Used for image galleries or numeric range selection (RangeSlider).
doc.carousel_choice_slideshow_when: Primary focus is autoplay, switching large visuals or full-screen images in order. Ideal for hero sections.
doc.carousel_content_guidelines: Maintain a consistent aspect ratio for content within slides and keep information at a level users can finish reading within a set time.
doc.carousel_design_intent: Carousels are used to efficiently present multiple contents with equal priority in a limited display area. They are highly visually appealing and suitable for content that you want users to browse proactively, such as banners or featured new products.
doc.carousel_differences_intro: While similar, these terms often refer to slightly different use cases.
doc.carousel_features_desc: Key functionalities of the Carousel component.
doc.carousel_guideline_1: Use when you want to effectively showcase multiple contents with equal priority (banners, featured products, etc.) in a limited space.
doc.carousel_guideline_2: Suitable for presenting visually compelling images or cards with a storytelling feel.
doc.carousel_image_example_desc: An example implementation of an image gallery or banner slider.
doc.carousel_long_desc: Details and usage for the Carousel component.
doc.carousel_motion_spec: Apply smooth horizontal (or vertical) movement for slide transitions. Provide fluid transitions such as manual stopping by user interaction or auto-play after a certain period.
doc.carousel_no_loop_desc: Setting loop={false} stops the carousel at the last slide without returning to the start.
doc.carousel_point_affordance_desc: Intuitively signal the presence of more content to the user.
doc.carousel_point_content_desc: Design for diverse content types like images, text blocks, or mixed media.
doc.carousel_point_responsive_desc: Ensure the layout adapts size and count dynamically based on screen width.
doc.carousel_req_auto_desc: Auto-rotates slides and pauses automatically when user interacts.
doc.carousel_req_indicator_desc: Visually represent current position and total count using dots or numbers.
doc.carousel_req_kbd_desc: Enables arrow key navigation and maintains proper focus management.
doc.carousel_req_loop_desc: Wraps back to the first slide after reaching the end of the list.
doc.carousel_req_nav_desc: Allow slide switching via previous/next buttons or swipe gestures.
doc.carousel_req_touch_desc: Specifically optimized for swipe interactions on mobile devices.
doc.carousel_responsive_desc: Adjust the number of visible slides based on breakpoints (e.g., 1 for mobile, 3 for desktop).
doc.carousel_scenario_gallery: Photo Gallery: Show multiple images one by one in a large display.
doc.carousel_scenario_hero: Hero Banner: Dynamically present campaigns or features on the site's top page.
doc.carousel_scenario_products: Recommended Products: Neatly introduce multiple products of the same category in a compact arrangement.
doc.carousel_specify_slides_desc: Use the slidesToShow property to determine how many slides are visible at once.
doc.carousel_what_is_desc: A Carousel is a UI component that scrolls through multiple items horizontally, helping to save screen space.
doc.image_a11y_desc: Follows WAI-ARIA guidelines with proper roles, labels, and keyboard navigation support.
doc.image_anatomy_content: The primary area where main content or children are rendered.
doc.image_anatomy_root: The outermost container managing state and layout.
doc.image_best_practice_1: Use Image consistently across your application to maintain a predictable user experience.
doc.image_best_practice_2: Test Image behavior across different screen sizes and input methods to ensure accessibility.
doc.image_choice_alt_when: When a simpler alternative like AspectRatio better suits the use case.
doc.image_choice_matrix_desc: Select the most appropriate component based on your requirements.
doc.image_choice_self_when: When Image functionality with standard options is required.
doc.image_content_guideline: Keep content concise and relevant to the component's purpose. Follow consistent labeling conventions across your application.
doc.image_design_intent: Image provides a consistent, reusable pattern for displaying images with responsive sizing, fallback, and styling, reducing implementation effort and ensuring design system compliance.
doc.image_feat_aspect_desc: Adjust image fitting with the fit (object-fit) property.
doc.image_feat_caption_desc: Add descriptive text below the image using the caption property.
doc.image_feat_styling_desc: Easily change appearance with radius, shadow, and border properties.
doc.image_long_desc: The Image component is a wrapper component for displaying images in a refined manner. It features responsive sizing, rounded corners, shadows, borders, and captions.
doc.image_motion_desc: Transitions are minimal and purposeful, respecting the user's reduced-motion preferences.
doc.image_scenario_1: Integrating Image into workflows for data collection or display.
doc.image_scenario_2: Using Image in management views for information organization.
doc.image_variant_caption: Add a caption to display an image description.
doc.image_variant_rounded: Adjust corner radius with the adius property.
doc.image_variant_shadow: Enable shadow for a floating effect.
doc.video_a11y_desc: Follows WAI-ARIA guidelines with proper roles, labels, and keyboard navigation support.
doc.video_adv_aspect_desc: Users can choose how the video fits the screen, such as `contain` or `cover`.
doc.video_adv_desc: By using `advancedControls={true}`, you can access various features required for modern video players.
doc.video_adv_pip_desc: Includes a toggle button for PiP mode to float the video in a corner of the screen.
doc.video_adv_playlist_desc: Treat multiple videos as a list, providing a list selection UI and automatic transition when a video ends.
doc.video_adv_q_desc: Select video quality like 1080p, 720p from a dropdown, switching playback seamlessly from the current position.
doc.video_adv_resume_desc: By specifying with `videoId`, it automatically saves the playback position and resumes from where it left off on the next visit.
doc.video_adv_skip_desc: Includes skip buttons on the operation bar, and on mobile, double-tapping the left or right of the screen also performs skip actions.
doc.video_adv_speed_desc: A UI that allows users to freely change the playback speed from 0.25x to 2.0x.
doc.video_anatomy_content: The primary area where main content or children are rendered.
doc.video_anatomy_root: The outermost container managing state and layout.
doc.video_best_practice_1: Use Video consistently across your application to maintain a predictable user experience.
doc.video_best_practice_2: Test Video behavior across different screen sizes and input methods to ensure accessibility.
doc.video_choice_alt_when: When a simpler alternative like Audio better suits the use case.
doc.video_choice_matrix_desc: Select the most appropriate component based on your requirements.
doc.video_choice_self_when: When Video functionality with standard options is required.
doc.video_content_guideline: Keep content concise and relevant to the component's purpose. Follow consistent labeling conventions across your application.
doc.video_desc: A component for embedding and controlling local or remote video content
doc.video_design_intent: Video provides a consistent, reusable pattern for video playback component with controls and advanced features, reducing implementation effort and ensuring design system compliance.
doc.video_feat_1_desc: Toggle playback UI display with the `controls` property.
doc.video_feat_2_desc: Supports background video effects by combining `autoPlay`, `loop`, and `muted`.
doc.video_long_desc: The `Video` component is for easily embedding video files. It supports autoplay, loop, toggle controls display, rounded corners, shadows, and more.
doc.video_mobile_desc: When using custom controls, the volume slider is hidden in mobile environments with a screen width of 576px or less. The mute/unmute toggle button remains visible.
doc.video_mobile_reason_1_desc: Expanding the volume slider within a narrow control bar would inevitably overlap with other elements like the seek bar and settings icons.
doc.video_mobile_reason_2_desc: Major video platforms like YouTube, Netflix, and Prime Video do not have volume sliders in their mobile apps. On mobile, adjusting volume via device hardware buttons (Volume Up/Down keys) is the standard UX.
doc.video_mobile_reason_3_desc: Even if the volume slider is hidden, the sound can still be toggled on/off with the mute button.
doc.video_motion_desc: Transitions are minimal and purposeful, respecting the user's reduced-motion preferences.
doc.video_premium_features_mdx_desc: Use the demoDelay prop and fadeIn effect to show a skeleton UI before the video loads — ideal for simulating latency or async data fetching.
doc.video_scenario_1_desc: Use autoPlay, loop, and muted together to create a looping background video on landing page hero sections for dynamic visual impact.
doc.video_scenario_2_desc: Use playlist and customControls to showcase multiple product videos in sequence, with quality switching and resume playback.
doc.video_scenario_3_desc: Leverage advancedControls with playback speed, chapter skipping, and PiP mode for an interactive learning video experience.
doc.video_title: A component for embedding and controlling local or remote video content
doc.video_variant_custom: With wimui's unique custom control UI applied.
doc.video_variant_full: A full-featured player with all advanced features (playlist, aspect ratio, quality, resume playback, shortcuts, etc.) enabled.
doc.video_variant_rounded: A design with rounded corners and shadows.
doc.watermark_a11y_desc: Follows WAI-ARIA guidelines with proper roles, labels, and keyboard navigation support.
doc.watermark_anatomy_content: The primary area where main content or children are rendered.
doc.watermark_anatomy_root: The outermost container managing state and layout.
doc.watermark_best_practice_1: Use Watermark consistently across your application to maintain a predictable user experience.
doc.watermark_best_practice_2: Test Watermark behavior across different screen sizes and input methods to ensure accessibility.
doc.watermark_choice_alt_when: When a simpler alternative like Image better suits the use case.
doc.watermark_choice_matrix_desc: Select the most appropriate component based on your requirements.
doc.watermark_choice_self_when: When Watermark functionality with standard options is required.
doc.watermark_content_guideline: Keep content concise and relevant to the component's purpose. Follow consistent labeling conventions across your application.
doc.watermark_design_intent: Watermark provides a consistent, reusable pattern for overlaying watermark text or images on content for protection, reducing implementation effort and ensuring design system compliance.
doc.watermark_motion_desc: Transitions are minimal and purposeful, respecting the user's reduced-motion preferences.
doc.watermark_scenario_1: Integrating Watermark into workflows for data collection or display.
doc.watermark_scenario_2: Using Watermark in management views for information organization.
doc.watermark_var_image_desc: Uses an image such as a logo as a watermark via the `image` prop.
doc.audio_token_primary: Accent color for the play button, progress bar fill, and active state.
doc.audio_token_primary_light: Background color for active buttons (translucent primary color).
doc.audio_token_radius_full: Pill shape, circular buttons, and slider thumbs.
doc.aspectratio_keyboard_desc: This component is a layout primitive with no keyboard interaction of its own. Apply keyboard navigation to interactive content placed inside it.
doc.aspectratio_i18n_desc: Apply i18n to the content placed inside the AspectRatio component.
doc.audio_keyboard_desc: Tab moves focus through the audio controls. Space toggles play and pause. Arrow keys adjust the seek position or volume. M mutes or unmutes.
doc.audio_i18n_desc: All visible text uses i18n keys. Pass translated strings through the aria-label props.
doc.image_keyboard_desc: This component does not require specific keyboard interaction. Ensure a meaningful alt text is provided for screen reader accessibility.
doc.image_i18n_desc: Pass a translated description through the alt prop.
doc.video_keyboard_desc: Tab moves focus through the video controls. Space toggles play and pause. Arrow keys adjust seek position or volume. M mutes or unmutes. F toggles fullscreen.
doc.video_i18n_desc: All visible text uses i18n keys. Pass translated strings through the aria-label props.

media.alt_text_desc: Always set alt text for images/videos. Helps accessibility and SEO.
media.autoplay_limit_desc: Minimize autoplay on audio/video as it often surprises users and violates a11y standards.
media.carousel_desc: Best for banner ads, product galleries, or story-format content displays.
media.custom_controls_desc: Add custom controls to match your app's tone & manner.
media.guide_desc: Effectively use images, videos, and audio to convey information visually and aurally.
media.performance_desc: Use `lazy loading` for performance optimization, and `AspectRatio` to prevent layout shifts.
media.skeleton_usage_desc: Show a `Skeleton` during heavy media file loading to indicate progress.
